items.name: Red and White on Green Trousers
Relaxed Tapered Jean and Braided Leather Belt
items.description: In a medium indigo wash with whiskering throughout, this version of our Relaxed Tapered jean is crafted with Turkish denim and is artfully detailed to achieve a paint-splatter effect paired with a supple leather that is intricately braided to create this belt, which features a square metal buckle engraved with our signature logo.
